title: The 5 Layers of a Programming Language
author: Mangal dev
text:
The 5 Layers of a Programming Language
Ab hum wahi 5 major layers ko Python ke context me breakdown karenge — aur har layer me khud verify karenge (hands-on).
🔵 Layer 1: Language Design (Python ka Philosophy & Core Model)
Layer 1 ka matlab hota hai:
Language likhne se pehle decide karna — ye language behave kaise karegi?
Python ka core design philosophy:
🔵 Part 1: Philosophy Verify Karo (Readability First)
Python ka design goal:
- Code readable hona chahiye
- Natural English jaisa feel
🔹 Hands-on Test 1
Ek file banainge philo.py naam ke .
age = 18
if age >= 18:
print("Adult")
else:
print("Minor")
Ab compare karo same logic C style me (sirf compare ke liye conceptual):
if(age >= 18){
printf("Adult");
}
Observation :
Python me:
- No curly braces
- Indentation mandatory
- Syntax minimal
✔ Python intentionally visual clarity ko enforce karta hai.
🔵 Part 2: Indentation as Design Decision
Python me indentation syntax ka part hai.
🔹 Verify:
if True:
print("Hello")
ye run karenge.
Error mila : IndentationError
Language design decision:
Blocks ko braces se nahi, indentation se define karo.
Ye readability enforce karta hai.
🔵 Part 3: Dynamic Typing (Core Philosophy)
Python design choice:
Variable ka type runtime pe decide hoga.
🔹 Verify:
Design decision:
- No type declaration
- Flexible variable binding
🔵 Part 4: Object Model (Everything is Object)
Python design:
Sab kuch object hai.
🔹 Verify:
Even integer ke paas methods hain.
Check:
Ye C jaisa primitive nahi — ye object hai.
🔵 Part 5: High-Level Abstraction
Python low-level memory expose nahi karta.
Try:
a = 5
b = a
Memory manually manage nahi karna padta.
Design decision:
- Developer productivity > manual control
🔵 Part 6: Multi-Paradigm Support
Python allow karta hai:
Procedural
def add(a, b):
return a + b
Object Oriented
class User:
def __init__(self, name):
self.name = name
Functional
nums = [1,2,3]
squared = list(map(lambda x: x*x, nums))
Design decision:
Restrict mat karo — flexibility do.
🔵 Part 7: “Batteries Included” Philosophy
Python ke saath huge standard library aata hai.
Verify:
import os
import hashlib
import socket
Networking? ✔
Hashing? ✔
File system? ✔
Design decision:
External dependency kam rakho.
🧠 Layer 1 ka Real Meaning
Language design ka matlab:
Ye sab coding se pehle decide kiya gaya tha.
🔥 Try Practical Verification :
Experiment 1
Ek block intentionally wrong indentation ke saath likho.
Experiment 3
Check karo:
print(type(type(10)))
